cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes:
Starts and runs out of the bat. It is a very small, short, technically (hardware) non-demanding game. Runs in windowed & fullscreen mode. Takes the monitor frequency, so in my case, it ran in fixed 60FPS. 

(Some people have reported crashes after a patch update on MS Windows on startup, even BSOD's. Linux/Wine/Proton aka SteamOS/Play is a fine alternative!)
title: Qora
